legal_description.value: Lot 46, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19.

source_note.value: Demo-only instrument. Full reconveyance of the synthetic 2002 purchase-money DOT (20020100002). Releasing entity is 'Wells Fargo Bank NA' rather than 'Wells Fargo Home Mortgage Inc' because the servicing side of the business booked releases under the commercial-bank charter by 2005 — a real-world convention that matches the 2021 POPHAM release pattern where Wells Fargo (not VIP Mortgage, the originator) executed the reconveyance. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only reconveyance of the synthetic 2002 Roberts-family purchase DOT (20020100002). Releasing entity Wells Fargo Bank NA rather than Wells Fargo Home Mortgage Inc mirrors the real 2021 POPHAM pattern where the servicing-side successor executed the release. No real instrument by this recording number exists in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
